title: Represents numbers A
blurb: Place value into the millions, and decimals to thousandths.

title: Represents numbers B
blurb: Integers on the number line, and benchmark percentages.

title: Additive relations A
blurb: Mental and written strategies for adding and subtracting.

title: Additive relations B
blurb: Multistep problems and adding and subtracting decimals.

title: Multiplicative relations A
blurb: Products, factors, multiplication and division strategies.

title: Multiplicative relations B
blurb: Decimals by powers of 10, patterns and order of operations.

title: Representing quantity fractions A
blurb: Comparing unit fractions and adding fractions with the same denominator.

title: Representing quantity fractions B
blurb: Equivalent fractions, related denominators and fractions of quantities.

title: Geometric measure A
blurb: Coordinates, length and distance, perimeter and measuring angles.

title: Geometric measure B
blurb: Four quadrants, unit conversion and angle relationships.

title: Two-dimensional spatial structure A
blurb: Classifying 2D shapes and the area of rectangles.

title: Two-dimensional spatial structure B
blurb: Transformations and the area of composites, parallelograms and triangles.

title: Three-dimensional spatial structure A
blurb: Prisms, pyramids, nets and measuring capacity.

title: Three-dimensional spatial structure B
blurb: Building 3D objects and the volume of rectangular prisms.

title: Non-spatial measure A
blurb: Measuring mass and working with 12- and 24-hour time.

title: Non-spatial measure B
blurb: Converting mass units and solving duration problems.

title: Data A
blurb: Collecting data and constructing graphs and timelines.

title: Data B
blurb: Comparing data displays and spotting misleading graphs.

title: Chance A
blurb: Listing equally likely outcomes and probabilities as fractions.

title: Chance B
blurb: Observed versus expected frequencies and random generators.
